action.reasoning: Observation: The greedy heuristic baseline achieved an exploration score of 0.2508 and took ~6.6 minutes to evaluate. Analysis: The environment provides a 2D belief map and a list of reachable neighbor nodes. To improve upon the greedy heuristic, I will implement a Deep Q-Network (DQN) that takes the local map (processed via CNN) and neighbor features (relative position, utility, visited status) to predict Q-values for each neighbor. Decision: I will write model.py with the DQN architecture, train.py to train it for 400 episodes (using the heuristic for the first 50 episodes to populate the replay buffer with good transitions), and predict.py to evaluate the trained model.
